message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor "User Agent" as UserAgent
participant "Content removal API" as ContentRemovalAPI
participant "User Manager" as UserManager
database "User database" as UserDB
database "Content database" as ContentDB

note left of UserAgent: Should also include a CSRF token to prevent admins who are also\nvisit other, potentially XSS vulnerable or malicious sites\nfrom helping an unknown actor remove content without authorization.

UserAgent -> ContentRemovalAPI: Removal request (HTTP POST),\ncontains ID of content to be removed.
activate ContentRemovalAPI

ContentRemovalAPI -> UserManager: Retrieve role of requesting user.
activate UserManager
UserManager -> UserDB: Fetch user information from database.
activate UserDB
UserDB --> UserManager: Return query result.
deactivate UserDB
UserManager --> ContentRemovalAPI: Return user role.
deactivate UserManager

alt [User has admin role]
    ContentRemovalAPI -> ContentRemovalAPI: Validate removal request
    
    alt [Failed to validate removal request]
        ContentRemovalAPI --> UserAgent: Return an HTTP status code that signals validation failure.\nExact value depends on how the validation failed.
    else [Request is deemed valid]
        ContentRemovalAPI -> ContentDB: Remove content from DB.
        activate ContentDB
        ContentDB --> ContentRemovalAPI: Result of delete operation
        deactivate ContentDB
        
        alt [Content has been removed succesfully]
            ContentRemovalAPI --> UserAgent: Return HTTP 204 No Content
        else [Removal failed]
            ContentRemovalAPI --> UserAgent: Return HTTP Status code to signal reason for failure.
        end
    end
else [User is not authorized to remove content]
    ContentRemovalAPI --> UserAgent: Return HTTP 403 Forbidden to signal that the user has no permission to request what they just did.
end

deactivate ContentRemovalAPI

@enduml
```
